title: Milestone 4 — Canonical Artifacts (Audit + Hardening)
approach: audit + hardening pass: milestones 1-3 already encoded most of the canonical-artifact contract. This spec audits the nine ported prompts for four residual gaps (namespace ownership not fail-closed; slug validation inconsistent/out-of-order in create/plan/research; gc active-slug inference wrong for the slugless Pi layer; two-surface contract not formalized), hardens them, and formalizes the lifecycle-state vs project-memory separation (ADR-007). No changes to substantive procedural content; only the enumerated hardening edits + contract formalization. Operator resolutions: /create is the sole namespace creator (established = PLAN+TODO); /gc is project-wide, slugless, response-only.

success_criteria.criterion: Slug-validation regex precedes first slug-derived access in all five lifecycle prompts (order-aware)
success_criteria.verify: node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const rx="^(?=.{1,64}$)[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$";for(const f of ["create","plan","research","ship","verify"]){const s=fs.readFileSync(".pi/prompts/"+f+".md","utf8");const v=s.indexOf(rx);const accs=[".pi/artifacts/<slug>",".opencode/artifacts/MEMORY.md"].map(x=>s.indexOf(x)).filter(x=>x>=0);if(v<0||accs.length&&v>Math.min(...accs))throw new Error(f+": regex missing or after access")}'

success_criteria.criterion: /create is the sole namespace creator; plan/research/ship/verify never mkdir
success_criteria.verify: node -e 'const fs=require("fs");let create=0;for(const f of ["plan","research","ship","verify"]){const s=fs.readFileSync(".pi/prompts/"+f+".md","utf8");if(/mkdir -p[^\n]*\.pi\/artifacts/.test(s))throw new Error(f+": must not create namespace")}const c=fs.readFileSync(".pi/prompts/create.md","utf8");if(!/mkdir -p[^\n]*\.pi\/artifacts/.test(c))throw new Error("create: missing namespace creation")'

success_criteria.criterion: /plan, /ship, /verify require both PLAN.md and TODO.md (established-namespace guard)
success_criteria.verify: node -e 'const fs=require("fs");for(const f of ["plan","ship","verify"]){const s=fs.readFileSync(".pi/prompts/"+f+".md","utf8");if(!/PLAN\.md/.test(s)||!/TODO\.md/.test(s))throw new Error(f+": missing sentinel requirement")}'

success_criteria.criterion: /research returns response-only (no PROGRESS.md or memory write) when namespace missing/partial
success_criteria.verify: node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const s=fs.readFileSync(".pi/prompts/research.md","utf8");if(!/If the slug namespace does not exist|response only|response-only|do not (write|create)/i.test(s))throw new Error("research: missing response-only branch")'

success_criteria.criterion: /gc is slugless, response-only, description-only frontmatter, no active/latest, no lifecycle-artifact write, no MEMORY write
success_criteria.verify:
node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const s=fs.readFileSync(".pi/prompts/gc.md","utf8");const m=/^---
([\s\S]*?)
---
/.exec(s);if(!m)throw new Error("gc: no frontmatter");const k=[...m[1].matchAll(/^([\w-]+):/gm)].map(x=>x[1]);if(k.length!==1||k[0]!=="description")throw new Error("gc: frontmatter ["+k+"]");for(const re of [/active slug/i,/<slug>/,/\.active/,/ latest /i,/DECISIONS\.md under/i,/PROGRESS\.md/,/TODO\.md/])if(re.test(s))throw new Error("gc: forbidden "+re);if(!/project-wide/i.test(s)||!/response/i.test(s))throw new Error("gc: missing project-wide response-only contract")'

rg -q 'Two surfaces|two-surface|project memory.*separate|lifecycle state.*confined' AGENTS.md && rg -q '^## ADR-007:' .pi/artifacts/pi-template/DECISIONS.md && rg -qi 'two surface|project memory' .pi/artifacts/pi-template/PLAN.md

success_criteria.criterion: No regression in milestone-3 static suite (frontmatter 9/9, forbidden CLEAN, slug presence 5/5)
success_criteria.verify:
node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const need={audit:["description","argument-hint"],create:["description","argument-hint"],fix:["description","argument-hint"],gc:["description"],init:["description","argument-hint"],plan:["description","argument-hint"],research:["description","argument-hint"],ship:["description","argument-hint"],verify:["description","argument-hint"]};for(const[f,keys]of Object.entries(need)){const s=fs.readFileSync(".pi/prompts/"+f+".md","utf8");const m=/^---
([\s\S]*?)
---
/.exec(s);if(!m)throw new Error(f+": no frontmatter");const got=[...m[1].matchAll(/^([\w-]+):/gm)].map(x=>x[1]);if(got.length!==keys.length||!keys.every(k=>got.includes(k)))throw new Error(f+": got ["+got+"] expected ["+keys+"]");}' && rg -q 'agent:|task\(|question\(|skill\(|write\(|\.active|spec\.md|prd\.json|tasks\.json|audit-pattern|batch-implement|deep-research|review-state\.json|/ui-slop-check|/compound|progress\.md|audit\.md' .pi/prompts/*.md || [ $? -eq 1 ] && for f in create plan ship verify research; do rg -q '<slug>' .pi/prompts/$f.md || exit 1; done

success_criteria.criterion: Source command bodies unchanged (baseline-bound to bebd044)
Target-heading preservation (every baseline ##/### heading in changed prompts remains)
success_criteria.verify: node -e 'const {execSync}=require("child_process");const fs=require("fs");const changed={"create":"d3c457bb","plan":"f5681d44","research":"61d1f23f","ship":"5dcc1d12","verify":"861f57b3","gc":"8a3fb183"};for(const[f]of Object.entries(changed)){const cur=fs.readFileSync(".pi/prompts/"+f+".md","utf8");const base=execSync(`git show bebd0449eb501fe9e7dd5fa66781ad1f1613a459:.pi/prompts/${f}.md`).toString();const bh=[...base.matchAll(/^##(#+)?.*$/gm)].map(x=>x[0]);for(const h of bh){if(!cur.split("\n").includes(h))throw new Error(f+": lost heading: "+h)}}'
rg -q 'cannot declare (terminal )?(verified status|completion)' .pi/prompts/ship.md && rg -qi 'sole.*verified|transcript only|no repository write' .pi/prompts/verify.md

success_criteria.criterion: prd graph bounded (2-3 tasks per child plan, <=3 files per task, ID-based deps)
success_criteria.verify: node -e 'const p=require("./.opencode/artifacts/milestone-4-canonical-artifacts/prd.json");const ids=new Map(p.tasks.map((t,i)=>[t.id,i]));if(ids.size!==p.tasks.length)throw new Error("dup/missing id");const bc={};for(const[i,t]of p.tasks.entries()){if(t.files.length>3)throw new Error(t.id+": >3 files");if(!t.child_plan)throw new Error(t.id+": missing child_plan");bc[t.child_plan]=(bc[t.child_plan]||0)+1;for(const d of t.depends_on){if(!ids.has(d))throw new Error(t.id+": unknown dep "+d);if(ids.get(d)>=i)throw new Error(t.id+": dep not earlier")}}for(const[b,n]of Object.entries(bc)){if(n<2||n>3)throw new Error(b+": "+n+" tasks")}'

tasks.title: Correct the active planning contract (spec, prd, plan)
tasks.end_state: spec.md corrected to: /create sole owner, established=PLAN+TODO, downstream fail-closed, research response-only, /gc project-wide slugless, two-surface ADR-007, fail-closed validators, baseline-bound immutability. prd.json restructured to A1-C3 task IDs + child_plan + manifests + ID-based deps. plan.md persisted with the 8-task serial plan.
tasks.verify: jq -e . .opencode/artifacts/milestone-4-canonical-artifacts/prd.json && node -e 'const p=require("./.opencode/artifacts/milestone-4-canonical-artifacts/prd.json");const ids=new Map(p.tasks.map((t,i)=>[t.id,i]));if(ids.size!==p.tasks.length)throw new Error("dup/missing id");const bc={};for(const[i,t]of p.tasks.entries()){if(t.files.length>3)throw new Error(t.id+": >3 files");if(!t.child_plan)throw new Error(t.id+": missing child_plan");bc[t.child_plan]=(bc[t.child_plan]||0)+1;for(const d of t.depends_on){if(!ids.has(d))throw new Error(t.id+": unknown dep "+d);if(ids.get(d)>=i)throw new Error(t.id+": dep not earlier")}}for(const[b,n]of Object.entries(bc)){if(n<2||n>3)throw new Error(b+": "+n+" tasks")}' && test -f .opencode/artifacts/milestone-4-canonical-artifacts/plan.md

tasks.title: Formalize canonical contract + ADR-007 (AGENTS, PLAN, DECISIONS)
tasks.end_state: AGENTS.md Lifecycle artifacts block has a Two surfaces subsection: lifecycle state (4 canonical files, confined to slug) vs project memory (MEMORY.md, optional separate surface; missing = non-blocking; /init may establish; /verify may append one distilled pre-fingerprint finding; never secrets/PII/raw output/per-slug status/final results). PLAN.md lifecycle flow mirrors it. DECISIONS.md has ADR-007 with Context/Decision/Consequences/Alternatives. Namespace ownership (/create sole creator; established=PLAN+TODO; downstream fail-closed) encoded.
tasks.verify: rg -q 'Two surfaces|two-surface|project memory.*separate|lifecycle state.*confined' AGENTS.md && rg -q '^## ADR-007:' .pi/artifacts/pi-template/DECISIONS.md && rg -qi 'two surface|project memory' .pi/artifacts/pi-template/PLAN.md && rg -qi 'sole.*namespace|established.*PLAN.*TODO|fail closed' AGENTS.md

tasks.title: Harden /create, /plan, /research (validation first, established-namespace guard, research response-only)
tasks.end_state: /create validates slug before any slug-derived access; keeps sole mkdir; distinguishes established/partial/absent namespaces. /plan and /research validate slug with the canonical regex before filesystem access and require both PLAN.md and TODO.md before lifecycle writes. /research returns response-only (no PROGRESS.md or memory write) when the namespace is missing or partial. All existing procedural content preserved (every baseline ##/### heading remains). No OpenCode-only constructs introduced.
tasks.verify: node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const rx="^(?=.{1,64}$)[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$";for(const f of ["create","plan","research"]){const s=fs.readFileSync(".pi/prompts/"+f+".md","utf8");const v=s.indexOf(rx);const accs=[".pi/artifacts/<slug>",".opencode/artifacts/MEMORY.md"].map(x=>s.indexOf(x)).filter(x=>x>=0);if(v<0||accs.length&&v>Math.min(...accs))throw new Error(f+": regex missing or after access")}const c=fs.readFileSync(".pi/prompts/create.md","utf8");if(!/mkdir -p[^\n]*\.pi\/artifacts/.test(c))throw new Error("create: missing mkdir");for(const f of ["plan","research"]){const s=fs.readFileSync(".pi/prompts/"+f+".md","utf8");if(/mkdir -p[^\n]*\.pi\/artifacts/.test(s))throw new Error(f+": must not create namespace");if(!/PLAN\.md/.test(s)||!/TODO\.md/.test(s))throw new Error(f+": missing sentinel")}const r=fs.readFileSync(".pi/prompts/research.md","utf8");if(!/If the slug namespace does not exist|response only|response-only|do not (write|create)/i.test(r))throw new Error("research: missing response-only branch")' && git diff --exit-code bebd0449eb501fe9e7dd5fa66781ad1f1613a459 -- .opencode/command/create.md .opencode/command/plan.md .opencode/command/research.md

tasks.title: Align /ship and /verify (require PLAN+TODO, two-surface wording, preserve authority)
tasks.end_state: /ship and /verify require both PLAN.md and TODO.md before any lifecycle write; replace the blanket 'All artifact reads and writes are confined to .pi/artifacts/<slug>/' wording with the two-surface wording (lifecycle state confined; optional project memory separate). Authority rules intact (/ship cannot declare terminal verified status; /verify sole external completion authority, transcript-only, no post-fingerprint write). All existing procedural content preserved.
tasks.verify: node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const rx="^(?=.{1,64}$)[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$";for(const f of ["ship","verify"]){const s=fs.readFileSync(".pi/prompts/"+f+".md","utf8");const v=s.indexOf(rx);const accs=[".pi/artifacts/<slug>",".opencode/artifacts/MEMORY.md"].map(x=>s.indexOf(x)).filter(x=>x>=0);if(v<0||accs.length&&v>Math.min(...accs))throw new Error(f+": regex missing or after access");if(/mkdir -p[^\n]*\.pi\/artifacts/.test(s))throw new Error(f+": must not create namespace");if(!/PLAN\.md/.test(s)||!/TODO\.md/.test(s))throw new Error(f+": missing sentinel");if(/All artifact reads and writes are confined/.test(s))throw new Error(f+": stale blanket confinement");if(!/lifecycle-state|project memory/i.test(s))throw new Error(f+": missing two-surface wording")}const sh=fs.readFileSync(".pi/prompts/ship.md","utf8");if(!/cannot declare (terminal )?(verified status|completion)/.test(sh))throw new Error("ship: authority regression");const ve=fs.readFileSync(".pi/prompts/verify.md","utf8");for(const re of [/sole.*verified/i,/transcript only/i,/no repository write/i])if(!re.test(ve))throw new Error("verify: missing "+re)}' && git diff --exit-code bebd0449eb501fe9e7dd5fa66781ad1f1613a459 -- .opencode/command/ship.md .opencode/command/verify.md

tasks.title: Make /gc project-wide slugless response-only
tasks.end_state: /gc has description-only frontmatter; no <slug> token; no active/latest inference; no lifecycle-artifact (PROGRESS/TODO/DECISIONS) write; no MEMORY.md write; grades project-wide template domains and emits the report in the response only. Reads project memory only when it exists. All quality phases preserved (Fallow, grade domains, recommendations).
tasks.verify:
node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const s=fs.readFileSync(".pi/prompts/gc.md","utf8");const m=/^---
([\s\S]*?)
---
/.exec(s);if(!m)throw new Error("gc: no frontmatter");const k=[...m[1].matchAll(/^([\w-]+):/gm)].map(x=>x[1]);if(k.length!==1||k[0]!=="description")throw new Error("gc: frontmatter ["+k+"]");for(const re of [/active slug/i,/<slug>/,/\.active/,/ latest /i,/DECISIONS\.md under/i,/PROGRESS\.md/,/TODO\.md/])if(re.test(s))throw new Error("gc: forbidden "+re);if(!/project-wide/i.test(s)||!/response/i.test(s))throw new Error("gc: missing project-wide response-only contract")' && git diff --exit-code bebd0449eb501fe9e7dd5fa66781ad1f1613a459 -- .opencode/command/gc.md

tasks.title: Record candidate evidence (pending final no-write verification)
tasks.end_state: .pi/artifacts/pi-template/TODO.md, PROGRESS.md, and .opencode/state.md record the milestone-4 hardening complete but verification PENDING (not VERIFIED). Commands, exit codes, baseline OID, verified paths, and runtime-smoke deferral logged. Every A/B validator and the milestone-3 regression suite pass.

tasks.title: Close implementation state (spec, roadmap; mark A1-C2 done, C3 pending)
tasks.end_state: spec.md marks only A1-C2 complete; C3 explicitly pending external no-write verification. roadmap.md milestone 4 marked implementation-done/verification-pending. jq validates prd.json. All remote synchronization complete before C3.

tasks.title: Final no-write static verification (external declaration only)
tasks.end_state: All success-criteria checks pass read-only; source command bodies unchanged against bebd044; target headings preserved; git diff --check clean; local HEAD == remote main == remote main:master; fingerprint tuple captured before and after, unchanged. VERIFIED declared in response/session transcript only. No repository write after the baseline fingerprint. Runtime verification deferred to milestone 6.
tasks.verify: fingerprint tuple captured and compared unchanged after every read-only validator; git diff --exit-code bebd0449eb501fe9e7dd5fa66781ad1f1613a459 -- .opencode/command/; git diff --check; git rev-parse HEAD == origin/main == origin/master
